name: Guangxi Wuzhou Zhongheng Group Co.,Ltd
summary: Guangxi Wuzhou Zhongheng Group Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells pharmaceuticals in China. The company offers pills, capsules, and injections and tablets for cardiovascular and cerebrovascular diseases, bruises, gynecological diseases, and respiratory diseases. It also produces health food products under the DOUBLE MONEY brand, as well as health-care functional beverages, smokable turtle pastes, jelly-type turtle paste, etc. The company is based in Wuzhou, China.
